_comment: SymbolicDag: Distributed ML training with partitioner-managed placement.
placement:'all' nodes run one copy per machine:
load       → load_0, load_1
partition  → partition_0, partition_1  (out_base:10 → slots 10,11 per machine)
pca_0      → pca_0_0, pca_0_1         (output_offset:100 → reads 10, writes 110)
pca_1      → pca_1_0, pca_1_1         (output_offset:100 → reads 11, writes 111)
aggregate_pca → aggregate_pca_0, aggregate_pca_1  (upstream=[110,111], downstream=200)
redistribute  → redistribute_0, redistribute_1    (reads slot 200, outputs 8 chunks)
train_0..7 → train_0_0..train_7_1     (per-machine, explicit arg/arg2 slots)
aggregate_train → aggregate_train_0, aggregate_train_1  (upstream=[130..137], downstream=300)
shared_inputs is auto-derived from the 'load' Input node.
Auto-placed nodes: aggregate_global, validate, save (Pack → colocate on node 0).
aggregate_global collects both machines' aggregate_train via 1 RDMA op.
Slot conventions (preserved from ClusterDag for WASM/Python compatibility):
partition:    out_base:10 → arg=N_consumers=2; consumers at slots 10, 11
pca_i:        output_offset:100 → reads 10+i, writes 110+i
aggregate_pca: explicit upstream=[110,111], downstream=200
redistribute: arg=200 (input), arg2=8 (n_outputs); writes to slots 30..37 internally
train_i:      arg=30+i (input), arg2=130+i (output)
aggregate_train: upstream=[130..137], downstream=300
